package: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Sovereign Experience Stream Lab

doctrine.headline: Experience becomes authority only after proof.
doctrine.subhead: GoalOS turns accepted proof into governed experience, governed experience into temporal options, and temporal options into safer future routing.
doctrine.claimBoundary: Browser-local synthetic demonstration. No external audit, no production certification, no empirical SOTA claim, no live settlement, no staking, no value movement, no user data.

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Decide whether a synthetic research brief deserves institutional acceptance.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Review a synthetic automation delivery for replayability, risk, and acceptance readiness.

scenarios.label: Defensive readiness packet
scenarios.objective: Convert a synthetic defensive readiness check into governed experience without unsafe action.

scenarios.label: Policy option proof
scenarios.objective: Turn policy options into claim-bounded, replayable evidence states.
